skills.name: Combustion
skills.description: Explodes an item registered in the Alchemy Workshop to damage nearby enemies.

skills.name: Dig
skills.description: Dig up the ground to collect materials required for alchemy.
skills.effect_text:
Acquire CaptionRatio material(s)
The types of material obtained depends upon where [Dig] was used.

skills.name: Gem Roasting
skills.description: Open a shop that enhances gem by heating it up. Reduces the penalty of an enhanced gem.

skills.name: Tincturing
skills.description: Extract fluid from herbs to create different potions.
skills.effect_text: Create a potion through a recipe

skills.name: Magnum Opus
skills.description: Use pluvial of alchemy to create a new item.

skills.name: Item Awakening
skills.description: Opens a shop to awaken hidden abilities in items.

skills.name: Alchemistic Missile
skills.description: Concentrate magic energy and fire it at enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 2
Casting Time: 1 second

skills.name: Sprinkle HP Potion
skills.description: Sprinkle an HP Potion registered in the Alchemy Workshop around to restore your HP and that of your party members. You can only register Alchemist-made potions.

skills.name: Sprinkle SP Potion
skills.description: Sprinkle an SP Potion registered in the Alchemy Workshop around to restore your SP and that of your party members. You can only register Alchemist-made potions.

attributes.name: Combustion: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Combustion] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Tincturing: Block Potion
attributes.description: * Obtain recipe to craft Block Potion with [Tincturing]

attributes.name: Tincturing: Physical Critical Attack Potion
attributes.description: * Obtain recipe for 'Critical Attack Potion' to craft with [Tincturing].

attributes.name: Tincturing: Magic Critical Attack Potion
attributes.description: * Obtain recipe for 'Magic Amplification Potion' to craft with [Tincturing].

attributes.name: Alchemistic Missile: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Alchemistic Missile] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Tincturing: Fine Elixir (HP)
attributes.description: * Obtain the recipe to craft Small Elixirs of HP Recovery with [Tincturing]

attributes.name: [Arts] Tincturing: Fine Elixir (SP)
attributes.description: * Obtain the recipe to craft Small Elixirs of SP Recovery with [Tincturing]

attributes.name: [Arts] Combustion: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Combustion] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Alchemistic Missile: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Alchemistic Missile] by 1.25% per attribute level
